questions.question: Why is using a plain ref at module scope in a Nuxt composable dangerous during SSR?
options: It causes TypeScript errors in strict mode
It is not reactive inside templates
The ref is shared across all requests, leaking data between users
It cannot be serialized into the Nuxt payload

questions.question: Which composable runs initialization logic only once on the server and never replays it on the client?
Which useState serialization limitation is explicitly mentioned in the docs?
options: Arrays with more than 100 items cannot be serialized
useState cannot hold objects with more than 10 keys
Functions, class instances, and symbols cannot be stored in useState
useState values must be primitive types only
